fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 65 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly treats an entry as valid when the current time is exactly equal to its expiry time. The check should be inclusive (`>=`) to correctly invalidate entries at the moment they expire.

constraints.intent: The strict expiry check's result should match the result of the correct inclusive (>=) check.
If an entry is considered not expired, the current time must be strictly before its expiry time.
A cached value should only be used (i.e., returned) if it is not expired.
